description: Style Note Go to sleep looking good and feeling even better with these comfortable and trendy two piece night suits. An airy top and a snug bottom will keep you company in your slumber and ensure you are stylish always, even in your dreams! Product Details A blue two piece night suit Top Blue top with short fold over sleeves, a V neckline and a small buttoned pocket on the left chest Pants Matching blue pants with an elasticated waistband with a drawstring tie, black detailing and two pockets on either side in front Material and Care Blended fabric Wash cold with like colours Do not wring or bleach Dry inside out Use warm iron Size and Fit Regular fit The model (height 5'8", chest 33" and waist 28") is wearing a size M
